cores.description: Number of CPU cores per socket

storage_selector.description: CEL expression for selecting VM disk image storage

node.description: Run the VM on a specific Proxmox node

placement_strategy.description: Node selection strategy for auto-provisioned VMs, ignored when 'node' is set. 'spread' (default) balances by free memory, 'fewer-vms' prefers nodes running the fewest VMs, 'round-robin' cycles nodes within a machine request set, 'binpack' packs onto the most-loaded node that still fits.

network_bridge.description: Network bridge to attach to the VM, ex. vmbr0

vlan.description: VLAN tag for primary NIC, set to 0 for none

network_firewall.description: Enable per-VM firewall (fwbr) on primary NIC. Defaults to true. Set false when L2-broadcast services need traffic to bypass fwbr.

disk_ssd.description: Enable SSD emulation (ssd=1) for better performance on SSD/NVMe storage

disk_discard.description: Enable TRIM/discard support for thin-provisioned storage

disk_iothread.description: Enable dedicated IO thread for better disk performance

disk_cache.description: Disk cache mode. Use 'none' for best performance with battery-backed storage

disk_aio.description: Async IO mode. Use 'io_uring' for best performance on modern kernels

cpu_type.description: CPU type. Use 'host' for GPU passthrough/HPC, or 'x86-64-v2-AES' (default) for compatibility

machine_type.description: Machine type. Use 'q35' for GPU passthrough (native PCIe support)

bios.description: VM firmware. When set to 'ovmf', the provider also creates a 4MB EFI disk on the selected VM storage.

vga.description: Proxmox display adapter, for example 'std' or 'none'.

numa.description: Enable NUMA topology for better memory locality on multi-socket systems

hugepages.description: Enable hugepages for reduced TLB misses. Use '1GB' for GPU/HPC workloads

balloon.description: Enable memory ballooning. Set to false for GPU passthrough or hugepages

ha.title: High Availability
ha.description: Register the VM as a Proxmox HA resource. When set, the provider stops picking nodes for this machine set; Proxmox HA owns placement. Requires Proxmox VE 9+.

state.description: HA target state (default: started). The ha fields are reconciled on every provision, so a later edit takes effect. 'started': VM runs and HA restarts it on failure. 'stopped': stopped but HA-managed. 'disabled': resource defined, HA ignores it. 'ignored': removed from HA management.

comment.description: Human-readable comment on the HA resource.

max_restart.description: Max restart attempts on the current node (Proxmox default: 1).

max_relocate.description: Max relocate attempts once restarts are exhausted (Proxmox default: 1).

failback.description: When true, HA returns the VM to its preferred node once that node is back online.

rules.description: Proxmox HA rule names to add the VM to (Proxmox 9+; alphanumeric, dash and underscore). A VM may belong to multiple rules.

node_affinity_nodes.description: List of Proxmox node names used as the auto-managed node-affinity target set. The provider derives a per-machine-class node-affinity rule from this list; it is independent of the user-supplied 'rules' field. Applied when the rule is first created; later edits to the node set are ignored (change the rule in the Proxmox UI or pvesh).

node_affinity_strict.description: When true, mark the auto-managed node-affinity rule as strict, so the HA manager will never run VMs outside the configured node set. Defaults to false (soft affinity). Applies only to the rule derived from 'node_affinity_nodes', not to entries in 'rules'. Applied when the rule is first created; later edits are ignored.

resource_affinity.description: Resource affinity direction for the HA rule. 'negative' spreads VMs across nodes; 'positive' colocates them. Applied when the rule is first created; later edits to the direction are ignored (change the rule in the Proxmox UI or pvesh).

additional_nics.description: Additional network interfaces (e.g., for storage networks)

firewall.description: Enable Proxmox firewall for this NIC

pci_devices.description: PCI devices to pass through using Proxmox Resource Mappings

pcie.description: Use PCIe mode instead of PCI (recommended for GPUs)

primary_gpu.description: Set as primary GPU (x-vga=1) for display output

rombar.description: Enable ROM BAR for device ROM

additional_disks.description: Additional disks to attach to the VM (scsi1, scsi2, etc.)

storage_selector.description: CEL expression for selecting VM disk image storage for this disk

disk_ssd.description: Enable SSD emulation for this disk

disk_discard.description: Enable TRIM/discard support for this disk

disk_iothread.description: Enable dedicated IO thread for this disk

disk_cache.description: Disk cache mode for this disk

disk_aio.description: Async IO mode for this disk
